info.title: Gmail API
info.description: Read, send, and manage Gmail email. Requires OAuth2.

get.summary: List Gmail email messages in inbox
get.description: List Gmail email messages. Use to check Gmail inbox, search email, find messages from a sender, or list recent emails. Use q to filter (same syntax as Gmail search box). Returns message IDs only — you MUST call getMessageDetails with each messageId to read the actual email body and content.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 10, max 500). Keep low to avoid large responses.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results from a previous call

parameters.name: labelIds
parameters.description: Filter by label. Common values: INBOX, SENT, DRAFT, SPAM, TRASH, UNREAD, STARRED

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Limit fields returned to reduce response size. Use "messages(id,threadId),nextPageToken" to get only IDs.

200.description: List of message IDs. Call getMessageDetails with each messageId to read content.

get.summary: Get full Gmail email content by message ID
get.description: Read a specific Gmail email. Returns full email including From, To, Subject, Date and decoded body text. Use this after listMessages to read each email. Always use format=full to get the body content. The messageId comes from listMessages.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The message ID returned by listMessages

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Format: 'full' (default, includes decoded body), 'metadata' (headers only), 'minimal' (IDs only)

200.description: Full email message with headers and decoded body content

delete.description: Permanently deletes a Gmail email. This cannot be undone. Use trashMessage to move to Trash instead.

post.summary: Move a Gmail email to Trash
post.description: Moves a Gmail email to Trash. Automatically deleted after 30 days. Safer than deleteMessage.

Send an email from Gmail. The message must be a base64url-encoded RFC 2822 string in the 'raw' field. Build the raw string as: 'From: you@gmail.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Hello

Body text' then base64url-encode it.

200.description: Email sent, returns message ID and thread ID

get.summary: List Gmail email threads and conversations
get.description: List Gmail email threads (conversations). Use to browse inbox or find email chains. Returns thread IDs and short snippets only — you MUST call getThread with each threadId to read the actual email content. Use q to filter with Gmail search syntax. Keep maxResults low (5-10) to avoid large responses.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Gmail search query (same syntax as Gmail search box). Examples: "is:unread", "from:boss@company.com", "subject:meeting"

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of threads to return. Default 5 to keep response small — increase only if needed.

parameters.name: labelIds
parameters.description: Filter by label ID (e.g. INBOX, SENT, UNREAD)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Limit fields to reduce response size. Use "threads(id,snippet),nextPageToken" to get only IDs and preview text.

200.description: List of thread IDs and snippet previews. Call getThread with each threadId to read full content.

get.summary: Get a full Gmail email thread (conversation) with all messages
get.description: Returns all messages in a Gmail thread/conversation including full email bodies. Use this after listThreads to read actual email content. Always use format=full to get message bodies. The threadId comes from listThreads.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Message format: 'full' (with decoded bodies, default), 'metadata' (headers only), 'minimal'

200.description: Thread with all messages and full decoded body content

get.description: Returns all Gmail labels including system labels (INBOX, SENT, DRAFT, SPAM, TRASH) and user-created labels. Use to discover available label IDs for filtering.

200.description: List of labels with IDs, names, and types

get.description: Lists all draft emails in the Gmail mailbox.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of drafts to return

get.summary: Get Gmail account profile and stats
get.description: Returns the Gmail account email address, total message count, thread count, and history ID. Use to get the user's Gmail address.

200.description: Gmail profile including email address and mailbox stats
